headline: Xi to Visit North Korea; Stocks Drop, Used Car Prices Tumble
headline_zh: 习近平将访朝鲜 股市下跌 二手车价崩盘
narrative: Today's top story is the announcement of President Xi Jinping's upcoming visit to North Korea, underscoring Beijing's commitment to the Pyongyang alliance amid heightened U.S.-China tensions. Meanwhile, domestic markets sold off sharply, with the SSE Composite falling 1.38 percent, as concerns over deflation and the property sector persist. In regulatory news, the CAC unveiled a new AI-powered cybersecurity testing program, signaling a continued push to integrate advanced technology into state surveillance. Separately, the collapse of used fuel car prices reflects the accelerating disruption of EVs on the automotive industry.
narrative_zh: 今日头条是习近平主席即将访问朝鲜的公告，凸显在中美紧张局势加剧背景下北京对平壤盟友关系的承诺。与此同时，国内股市大幅下跌，上证综指跌1.38%，反映通缩和房地产行业的持续担忧。监管方面，网信办推出新的人工智能网络安全测试计划，显示继续推动将先进技术融入国家监控系统。此外，二手燃油车价格崩盘，反映了电动车对汽车行业的加速颠覆。
market_snapshot: SSE Composite 4027.736 ▼1.38% · Shenzhen Component 15314.7 ▼2.48% · ChiNext 3957.935 ▼3.20% · USD/CNY 6.765 ▼0.12% · USD/CNH 6.7674 ▼0.09%
